_meta.description: Static institutional profile for ITCS, Nile University. Used by the Chief Editor Agent to populate fixed sections of the strategic plan PDF. All data sourced from itcs.nu.edu.eg (scraped 2026-05-30) and the ITCS Strategic Plan 2020-2024 PDF (NAQAAE, approved Dec 2019, updated Dec 2022).

institution.school_name_english: School of Information Technology and Computer Science (ITCS)

location.address: Juhayna Square, 26th of July Corridor, El Sheikh Zayed
location.proximity_note: Located near the Smart Village technology hub

vision_mission.university_vision_english: To be a world-class inspirational institution with significant public benefit
vision_mission.university_mission_english: To contribute to the development of cultural values and to technology-driven economics in Egypt and the region through the pursuit of education, research, innovation, and entrepreneurship at the highest levels of excellence.
vision_mission.school_vision_arabic: أن تكون الكلية مؤسسة علمية مرموقة معترف بها دولياً كواحدة من أفضل كليات تكنولوجيا المعلومات وعلوم الحاسب إقليمياً في مجال البحث والتعليم وريادة الأعمال
vision_mission.school_vision_english: To be a world-class school recognized as one of the top information technology and computer science schools in the region for research, education, and entrepreneurship.
vision_mission.school_mission_arabic: تلتزم الكلية بإعداد خريج متميز علمياً ومهنياً في تخصصات عدة في مجال تكنولوجيا المعلومات وعلوم الحاسب. كما تعمل على المساهمة في ازدهار المجتمع وتحقيق أهداف التنمية المستدامة ودعم صناعة تكنولوجيا المعلومات من خلال البحث العلمي متعدد التخصصات والابتكار وتعزيز قدرات ريادة الأعمال
vision_mission.school_mission_english: The school is committed to preparing scientifically and professionally distinguished graduates in many information technology and computer science disciplines. It strives to strongly contribute to society's prosperity; achieve sustainable development goals; and support the information technology industry through multidisciplinary scientific research, innovation and enhancement of entrepreneurial capabilities.

governing_values.description: The capacity to harness available potential to achieve ambitious goals, leaving no room for failure.
Commitment to practical and scientific integrity standards.
Accepting differences and seeking complementary perspectives.

undergraduate_programs.mission: To achieve the academic and technical level necessary for students to cope with the steady growth in modern technology in developed societies.
undergraduate_programs.description: Focuses on developing deep understanding of modern computing systems. Equips students to apply Computer Science theories, abstraction, design, and implementation to solve real-life problems.

undergraduate_programs.accreditation: NAQAAE (national); ABET accreditation application planned August 2025
undergraduate_programs.mission: To equip students with advanced skills in AI and computer science to analyze biomedical data, develop diagnostic tools, propose effective treatments, and manage clinical information efficiently.
undergraduate_programs.description: Interdisciplinary field combining Computer Science, Information Technology, and Biomedical Engineering to improve biomedicine and human health.
program_educational_objectives: Interdisciplinary CS professionals integrating AI in healthcare
Leaders in innovation and cutting-edge medical data research
Entrepreneurs developing biomedical solutions for real-world challenges
Ethical graduates contributing to public health and societal welfare
abet_student_outcomes: Analyze complex computing problems and apply computing principles to identify solutions
Design, implement, and evaluate computing-based solutions meeting specific requirements
Make informed judgments based on legal and ethical principles
Function effectively as team members or leaders
Apply data science lifecycle techniques to satisfy stakeholder needs

undergraduate_programs.mission: To prepare generations of distinguished specialists in the field of artificial intelligence and its subfields such as Machine Learning, computer vision, pattern recognition, intelligent information systems, natural language processing, recommendation systems, and smart cities.
undergraduate_programs.description: Focuses on intelligence demonstrated by machines that mimic cognitive functions associated with the human mind. Students gain broad AI knowledge while developing practical skills to solve real-world problems.
key_competencies: Mathematical foundations of CS and AI

undergraduate_programs.note: Mentioned on website but no dedicated program page scraped

professional_diplomas.name: Big Data and Data Science Diploma
professional_diplomas.note: Nile University was the first Egyptian university to offer a professional diploma in data science.

professional_diplomas.name: Computational Drug Discovery and Development (C3D) Diploma

enrollment_history._source: ITCS Strategic Plan 2020-2024 PDF, p.13 (undergraduate) and p.14 (postgraduate)

members.name: Prof. Ahmed Hazem El-Mahdy
members.title: Acting Vice President for Research & Dean of ITCS

members.name: Prof. Walid Al-Atabany
members.title: Associate Dean for Undergraduate Programs & Director of Centre for Informatics (CIS)

members.name: Dr. Mohamed Mysara
members.title: Associate Professor; Director of Biomedical Informatics Program, Bioinformatics Professional Diploma, and Computational Drug Discovery & Development Diploma (C3D)

members.name: Dr. Tamer Arafa
members.title: Associate Professor & Program Director for Big Data Professional Diploma

specialized_labs: Big Data and High-Performance Computing Lab

features: First Egyptian research university (founded 2006) with strong focus on scientific research
Diverse faculty specializations across multiple programs
Majority of faculty hold PhDs from leading American, European, and Japanese universities
Dedicated research center (Centre for Informatics - CIS) with specialized research groups
Internally and externally funded research projects
Innovation supported through the Nile Pioneers (Rowad El-Nil) entrepreneurship center
Located adjacent to the Smart Village technology hub
State-supported AI and Biomedical Informatics programs aligned with Egypt Vision 2030
Distinguished postgraduate programs serving students from diverse disciplines
Moodle LMS fully deployed and used by faculty and teaching assistants
Alumni hold distinguished positions in global technology companies
Annual conference jointly with the Engineering school
Responsible for teaching computing courses across all Nile University programs
Continuous student engagement via Power-campus and digital platforms
Full Wi-Fi coverage and specialized digital library for researchers
Active college website with up-to-date information
Efficient administrative team serving students and faculty
Adequate facilities for academic, athletic, and cultural activities
Periodic self-assessment system for faculty to maintain educational and research quality
Annual career fair and support for student field training
Merit-based scholarship system for outstanding students

groups.name: Bioinformatics Research Group
groups.focus: Developing new software tools for biological data analysis and integration

groups.name: Pervasive and Distributed Computing Research Group
groups.focus: Smart environments with security, proactive healthcare, traffic management, and environmental monitoring applications

groups.name: Medical Imaging and Image Processing Research Group
groups.focus: New imaging, sensing, and precision detection methods for disease diagnosis

groups.name: Text Mining Research Group
groups.focus: Tools and algorithms for text analysis: sentiment analysis, smart information retrieval, rumor detection, social media analysis

groups.name: Medical Informatics Research Group
groups.focus: Analysis and integration of medical and biological data and signals

groups.name: Information Security Research Group
groups.focus: Tools for threat analysis and data integration in information security

goals.title_arabic: إعداد خريجين متميزين مؤهلين للمنافسة محلياً ودولياً
goals.title_english: Preparing distinguished graduates qualified to compete locally and internationally
objectives: Continuously develop programs to keep pace with global advances
Provide appropriate environment for educational, cultural, and sports activities
Qualify students for student exchange programs and international research laboratories

goals.title_arabic: عضو هيئة تدريس وهيئة معاونة متميز علمياً وبحثياً وفي مجال الجودة
goals.title_english: Distinguished faculty and teaching assistants academically, in research, and in quality
objectives: Create a flexible, motivating work environment for teaching and research
Apply a clear system for appointment, evaluation, and responsibility assignment
Raise the efficiency of faculty, teaching assistants, administrators, and staff

goals.title_arabic: بحث علمي مؤثر والتواصل مع الجامعات والعلماء المتميزين محلياً ودولياً
goals.title_english: Impactful scientific research and engagement with distinguished universities and scientists locally and internationally
objectives: Encourage faculty in scientific research and innovation
Strengthen partnership programs with distinguished international and local universities

goals.title_arabic: دعم صناعة تكنولوجيا المعلومات والمساهمة في حل المشكلات المحلية والدولية والمشاركة المجتمعية
goals.title_english: Supporting the IT industry and contributing to solving local and international problems and community engagement
objectives: Contribute to community development in IT
Cooperate with the IT industry sector
Spread the concept of entrepreneurship and freelancing culture
Encourage conversion of research outputs into prototypes and support production and development

distinctive_features_website.practical_experience: Competitions, hackathons, internships, and research projects
distinctive_features_website.research_focus: Students engage in faculty research projects from early years

undergraduate: Egyptian Thanawiya Amma (Science — Biology track, with Mathematics 2 course requirement)
postgraduate: Bachelor's degree in a relevant discipline, or
Prior experience in IT/CS fields with demonstrated seriousness and capability
